---
title: "Model-based Input-adaptive Vectorization"
date: 2016-04-01
year: 2016
pdf: "https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/stamp/stamp.jsp?arnumber=7480117"
venue: "MERCon 2016"
award: ""
code: ""
slides: ""
preprint: ""
video: ""
author:
  - name: Kirshanthan Sundararajah
  - name: Sanath Jayasena
categories:
  - Conference
description: ""
---
